author: gb9t
content: Iter 54 result: drivers/iommu/intel-cache.md (VT-d invalidation cache mgmt - cache.c ~534 lines; per-(domain, iommu, dev, pasid) CacheTag list + per-attach cache_tag_assign_domain + range/all flush dispatch to QI + IH-bit + non-present cache flush + iotlb_sync iommu-API hook) + virt/kvm/x86-mmu-spte.md (per-SPTE bit-layout + make_spte construction - spte.c ~576 + spte.h ~572; 64-bit SPTE bit map + EPT vs legacy variants + MMIO-SPTE special encoding for EPT-misconfig + access-track + NX-huge-page-split + sw-bit MMU/Host-Writable AND-coupling). 58 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/iommu/intel-debugfs.md (per-IOMMU debugfs surface for diagnostic) + virt/kvm/x86-mmu-page-track.md (page-tracker external-client write-notify for KVMGT/nested-virt).
